generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mom and a taxpayer, I've always believed in strong alliances for our security. But have you seen how much we're spending to protect countries that could contribute more? Our allies need to step up. We can't keep carrying the burden alone while our own infrastructure crumbles. #NationalSecurity #AllianceFairness
